things.name: Mahabalipuram Sculptures
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 7th-century Pallava rock-cut sculptures and shore temples

things.name: Marina Beach
things.description: World's second longest urban beach at 13km - Chennai's beloved promenade

things.name: Kapaleeshwarar Temple
things.description: 7th-century Dravidian temple to Shiva with a soaring rainbow gopuram gateway

things.name: Government Museum Chennai
things.description: South India's finest museum with Chola bronzes, Amaravati sculptures and a natural history collection

things.name: Fort St George & Museum
things.description: 1644 British fort - first in India - with the oldest Anglican church in Asia

things.name: San Thome Basilica
things.description: Catholic basilica built over the tomb of the Apostle Thomas who arrived in India in 52 AD

things.name: Kanchipuram Silk Saree Weaving
things.description: Day trip to the city of 1,000 temples and the finest silk sarees in Tamil Nadu

things.name: Bharatanatyam Classical Dance Performance
things.description: Chennai is the home of Bharatanatyam - India's most classical dance form

things.name: Murugan Idli Shop
things.description: Chennai's most famous breakfast - soft steamed rice idlis with sambar and coconut chutney

things.name: Arignar Anna Zoological Park
things.description: India's largest zoo with white tigers and Asiatic lions
